title: South Korea stocks lead gains in Asia as oil prices plunge after U.S.-Iran ceasefire deal
summary_full: Asia-Pacific markets opened higher after President Donald Trump said he agreed to suspend planned attacks on Iranian infrastructure for two weeks.
summary_public: Asia-Pacific markets opened higher after President Donald Trump said he agreed to suspend planned attacks on Iranian infrastructure for two weeks.

IR.label: positive
IR.evidence: oil prices plunge after U.S.-Iran ceasefire deal
